name: ChillPotato
description: ChillPotato was #1 mobile for countless months, getting the current record of longest maintained #1 in modern mobile. However, he was beaten by sample and lost his #1 mobile.

name: sample
description: sample managed to beat ChillPotato in a rank match, recieving #1. However, he has retired from his #1 spot.
